title: Create: ChocoPaste
description: This mod adds more possibilites of processing chocolate from the create mod.
body:
## Main features

- This mod adds the ability to store **chocolate** using the Create mod in **fancy looking jars**.

![4 jars, 2 full, 2 empty](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b72713eea95b5a19c8a2decf444679f9b7055b63_0.webp)

- Also, not to mention what **food** you are able to make! See gallery for images.

- For instance, currently, you are able to make a Toast and by spilling chocolate onto it, you can make a **Toast with chocolate paste** or even **sandwiches**, all using the Create mod.

![Production of Toast with Chocolate Paste](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a82b51cc0b8e887eea9dd940208debdb78475b54.png)

- Check out also the newly added Chimney cakes!

![Chimney cake productin line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/960631ee88f4b5543c8b280afa2e99808a56ddd2.png)

## Technical side

- The reason why to use the Create mod is because it adds the possibility to **automate products** and Create on its own has the chocolate fluid which this mod uses.

- If you have JEI (Just Enough Items) installed, the recipes can be viewed using JEI.

- This mod is expected to have more updates in the future.


<details>
<summary>
Spoiler of future updates
</summary>
I am planning to add:

- waffles and probably a waffle machine
- pancakes and a way to make them
- probably churros made in basin
- chimney cakes (already added in 0.4a) are expected to be made on shafts (most probably), I will also (in favor of its origin) add its original name when language is changed to Hungarian

(all of these are going to have a chocolate variant)
</details>



## Blocks and items this mod adds

- List of items:
  - Pressed dough
  - Toast
  - Toast with chocolate paste
  - Chocolate paste sandwich
  - Double chocolate paste sandwich
  - Chocolate Toast
  - Chimney cake
  - Chimney cake covered in chocolate
  - Chimney cake with chocolate
  - Sweet dough
  - Chimney cake dough 

- List of blocks:
  - ChocoPaste 250g
  - ChocoPaste 500g
  - Empty ChocoPaste 250g
  - Empty ChocoPaste 500g
